objective: Teach MedGemma to visually identify and understand Gulai Ikan, an Indonesian fish curry in turmeric coconut milk, across its product forms, textures, ingredients, culinary contexts, and label-relevant features.

hero_product: photorealistic bowl of Gulai Ikan Indonesian fish curry in turmeric coconut milk
Gulai Ikan fish curry with mackerel or snapper in rich yellow-orange coconut milk sauce
Sumatran style Gulai Ikan served in traditional Indonesian ceramic bowl
macro_texture: close-up of thick yellow-orange turmeric coconut milk curry gravy with fish chunks
texture detail of simmered fish in creamy coconut milk curry with visible spices
surface texture of rich Gulai Ikan curry showing fresh chilli, lemongrass, and kaffir lime leaf
raw_ingredients_and_process: fresh mackerel fish and snapper with turmeric root, galangal, lemongrass, shallots, and kaffir lime leaves
full-fat coconut milk pouring into simmering turmeric and galangal spiced curry base
Indonesian fish curry preparation simmering fish in coconut milk with fresh chilli and aromatic herbs
in_the_wild_context: Gulai Ikan served at Indonesian restaurant with steamed white rice
Sumatran Malay warung serving traditional Gulai Ikan fish curry in bowl
home-cooked Gulai Ikan with side dishes in typical Indonesian dining setting
culinary_application: Gulai Ikan fish curry plated with steamed rice and fresh vegetable side
Indonesian meal featuring Gulai Ikan as main protein dish with sambal and rice
Malay style Gulai Ikan served in traditional meal context with banana leaf and condiments
label_truth: close-up of Gulai Ikan dish highlighting fish allergen ingredient
nutritional label showing high saturated fat and moderate sodium content in Gulai Ikan
ingredient list emphasizing fish, turmeric, coconut milk, and fresh chilli in Gulai Ikan curry
